use_cases: Login and signup forms requiring animated label transitions
Contact forms with floating label text fields
Any text input needing a space-efficient floating label pattern
Forms using shadcn/ui design system components
ai_summary: A floating label input component built with React and Tailwind CSS that animates the label from a centered placeholder position to an elevated position above the input when focused or filled. Integrates with shadcn/ui components (Input, Label) and uses CSS peer selectors for smooth transitions. The label transforms position and scales using translate and scale CSS properties with a 300ms duration for a polished micro-interaction effect.
